calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Assigned for trial. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Leland Batara; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Plaintiff Leon Taylor appears with counsel, Ronald D. Schivo, Esq. No appearance by or for defendant. Plaintiff and counsel are both sworn and testify. Plaintiff's Exhbits are admitted in evidence and withdrawn following the hearing: #1: Lease; #2: Tenant payment history; #3: 30-day notice; #4: Proof of Service of 30-day notice. Judgment for plaintiff awarded. Judgment signed and filed this date.
Motion To Compel Defts' Responses To Written Discovery Requests And For Sanctions
